title: Adobe Analytics Report Request
description: Schema for an Adobe Analytics 2.0 API report request body. Defines the structure for specifying metrics, dimensions, filters, date ranges, and settings when running a report.

rsid.description: The report suite ID to run the report against

locale.description: Locale for response labels and dimension values

globalFilters.description: Filters applied to the entire report. Must include at least one dateRange filter.

metricContainer.description: Container defining the metrics to include in the report

dimension.description: The primary dimension ID for the report (e.g. 'variables/page', 'variables/evar1')

settings.description: Report output settings such as pagination and row limits

statistics.description: Statistical settings controlling summary row inclusion

search.description: Search filter to narrow returned dimension items

ReportFilter.description: A filter applied to a report, either globally or at the metric level

id.description: Identifier for this filter, used to reference it from metrics

segmentId.description: The ID of a saved segment to apply as a filter

itemId.description: Dimension item ID for breakdown filters

itemIds.description: List of dimension item IDs for excludeItemIds filter

MetricContainer.description: Container specifying the metrics and metric-level filters for a report

metricFilters.description: Filters available to be applied at the metric level

metrics.description: List of metrics to include as columns in the report

ReportMetric.description: A single metric column in a report request

columnId.description: A client-assigned column identifier used in the response to map metric values

filters.description: IDs of metricFilters to apply to this metric column

sort.description: Sort order for rows based on this metric

ReportSettings.description: Settings controlling pagination and output behavior of the report

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return per page

page.description: Zero-indexed page number for paginated results

nonesBehavior.description: How to handle 'None' dimension items in the results

countRepeatInstances.description: Whether to count repeat instances of an eVar

ReportSearch.description: Search criteria to filter returned dimension items by value

clause.description: Search clause in Analytics search syntax

excludeItemIds.description: List of dimension item IDs to exclude from results

itemIds.description: List of specific dimension item IDs to include
